title: TTM Technologies Inc (TT1.HM) Analyst insights, Price targets and Recommendations
full_text: This article provides analyst insights, price targets, and recommendations for TTM Technologies Inc (TT1.HM). It highlights that several firms, including Needham, B. Riley Securities, and Truist Securities, have consistently maintained a "Buy" rating for the company over recent months. The stock was last recorded at 82.00, showing a decrease of 4.09%.
